title: 🕳 Anti-Meaning Attractors
name: Anti-Meaning Attractors
what_it_is: Gravitational wells of semantic collapse—regions where meaning becomes unstable, language and symbol spiral into void.

animation_behavior: Words dissolve mid-sentence, symbols collapse inward, narrative loops into nullspace ---
